title: lindsaea divergens
intro: Lindsaea divergens is a species of fern, commonly known as the divergent tree fern. It is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, Australia, and New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Lindsaea divergens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves to support health and wellness, with reported benefits including wound healing and the relief of respiratory issues.
